description_long: This object consists of three distinct gravestones, each with a unique silhouette and base. The gravestones are made of dark, weathered stone, featuring visible cracks and a slightly rough texture. The leftmost gravestone is rectangular with a flat top, the center one has a rounded top, and the rightmost gravestone has a gently arched top with a more ornate profile. All three gravestones rest on rectangular plinths, giving them stability and a sense of permanence. The surfaces are unadorned, with no visible inscriptions or decorative motifs. The overall appearance suggests durability and a somber, respectful presence suitable for a graveyard or cemetery setting.
description: A set of three dark stone gravestones with distinct shapes and visible cracks, each mounted on a rectangular base. The stones are unadorned and have a weathered, somber appearance.
description_view_0: A narrow side view showing the thin profile of the gravestones, with their bases aligned in a row.
description_view_1: A frontal view displaying the three gravestones: rectangular, rounded, and arched, all with visible cracks and dark stone texture.
description_view_2: The opposite side view, again showing the thinness of the gravestones and the alignment of their bases.
description_view_3: A rear view of the gravestones, revealing the backs of the three distinct shapes and their bases.
